name_en: New small size Praphy shoulder bag, featuring a crescent shape, with the classic large metal logo [FEND1] decorated at the bottom. The bag's silhouette follows the body's lines perfectly, exuding a full sense of fashion when carried on the shoulder.
name_cn:
New small size Praphy shoulder bag, featuring a crescent shape, with the classic large metal logo [FEND1] decorated at the bottom. The bag's silhouette follows the body's lines perfectly, exuding a full sense of fashion when carried on the shoulder.
Small: 20x7.5x13cm
Style: 8024-1
